fields.title: fix: protect entire .git/ directory, not just .git/hooks
fields.description: Only .git/hooks is protected. Writing .git/config (core.pager, core.editor) gives RCE on next unsandboxed git call. Protect all of .git/ in both fs-policy.ts and bwrap --ro-bind.
fields.close_reason: Fixed: entire .git/ protected via fs-policy and bwrap --ro-bind
